name: Spiral inductor with multi-layer substrate
description: Tests that the agent uses a multi-layer substrate for spiralInductor (required) and extracts inductance at a specific frequency
prompt: Design a 4-turn square spiral inductor on a 2-layer PCB substrate (1.6mm FR4 over 0.2mm FR4) and tell me the inductance at 600 MHz.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses a multi-layer dielectric (at least 2 layers) — spiralInductor requires this
assertions.expected: Thickness vector with 2+ elements or two dielectric names

assertions.description: Calls inductance() with a frequency argument
Does not attempt design() which does not exist for spiralInductor

name: Interdigital capacitor with de-embedded extraction
description: Tests that the agent uses DeEmbed=true when extracting capacitance to isolate the capacitor from feed lines
prompt: I have an interdigital capacitor and I need the true capacitance value at 5 GHz, without feed line effects contaminating the measurement.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses DeEmbed=true to remove feed line effects
Does not attempt design() which does not exist for interdigitalCapacitor

name: Marchand balun without design()
description: Tests that the agent sets balun dimensions manually or uses optimize() since baluns have no design() method
prompt: I need a Marchand balun for a 2.4 GHz balanced mixer. Set it up on 1.6mm FR4 and show me its S-parameters from 1 to 4 GHz.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Does not attempt design(balunMarchand,...) which does not exist
Sets dimensions manually (CoupledLineLength, CoupledLineWidth, etc.) or uses optimize()
assertions.expected: Manual property assignments or optimize() call
